shared_categories.label: Confidential Data Exposure
shared_categories.description: Sensitive customer or institutional information may have been included in a request or response.

shared_categories.label: Prompt Injection or Manipulation
shared_categories.description: An input may be attempting to override workflow or compliance instructions.

shared_categories.label: Policy Violation
shared_categories.description: A request or response violated configured AI control rules.

shared_categories.label: Provider Misuse
shared_categories.description: An unapproved provider, model, or routing behavior was requested.

shared_categories.label: Approval Required
shared_categories.description: The action should not proceed without explicit supervisory or risk review.

shared_categories.label: Auditability Gap
shared_categories.description: Required oversight or traceability details were missing.

preset_categories.label: Market Disclosure Risk
preset_categories.description: A response may create unsuitable, misleading, or premature market-facing content.
